Downloads.. end shieldsInstallation--------------.. start installationapeye-core can be installed from PyPI or Anaconda.To install with pip.. code-block bash python -m pip install apeye-coreTo install with conda.. code-block bash conda install -c conda-forge apeye-core.. end installation
